title: Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript Highlights: Navigating Challenges
text: Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) reported Q1 2024 earnings with revenue surpassing expectations despite continued losses. Revenue was reported at $128 million for Q1 2024, marking a 24% increase year-over-year, surpassing the estimate of $124.87 million. Net loss stood at $64.6 million, showing improvement from $129.3 million in the prior year's quarter, but fell short of the estimated $33.39 million. Earnings Per Share (EPS) recorded at -$0.74, which did not meet the estimated -$0.39. Key Operational Metrics: Loan originations totaled $1.1 billion, up 13% from the previous year, with a conversion rate improvement from 8% to 14%. Contribution profit increased to $81.1 million, up 20% year-over-year, with a contribution margin improving to 59%. Forward Guidance: The company expects revenue of approximately $125 million and a net loss of approximately $75 million for Q2 2024. Consumer risks and interest rates remain high, constraining the volume of transactions on the platform.
